name: fem-cae
description: Turns an AI coding agent into a disciplined finite-element analyst. Encodes the full CAE workflow (idealization -> meshing -> connections -> solve controls -> convergence -> GCI mesh independence -> V&V), headless/batch automation recipes, result-parsing gotchas, and a precise headless-vs-human contract across Ansys, Simcenter, Thermal Desktop, Abaqus, LS-DYNA, MSC Nastran, COMSOL, OpenFOAM and more.
